narrative:
Cols 74-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 658 registered voters, with 47.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points.
